user.title: Add child
user.description: Add a child to monitor medication doses.

custom_medication.title: Add custom medication
custom_medication.description: Add one custom medication. Use max amount for the total allowed in 24 hours.

error.invalid_custom_medication: Enter a unique custom medication name and positive dose values. Built-in medicine names cannot be used.

init.title: Manage children
init.description: Choose a child to edit, or add another child.

custom_medication.title: Edit custom medication
custom_medication.description: Update or remove this custom medication. Use max amount for the total allowed in 24 hours.

error.invalid_custom_medication: Enter a unique custom medication name and positive dose values. Built-in medicine names cannot be used.
